title: Andy Burnham will push to become PM before Labour conference, allies say
description: Autumn conference in Liverpool targeted for victorious homecoming but Reform UK to fight hard in byelection
content:
Andy Burnham will push to become prime minister in time to address Labour’s autumn party conference in Liverpool, his supporters have said.

title: UK joins European deal to send rejected asylum seekers to third-country hubs
description: All 46 Council of Europe members sign agreement ‘deplored’ by human rights organisations
content:
The UK and 45 other European countries have signed an agreement that explicitly endorses plans to send unwanted asylum seekers to third country hubs.
A political declaration from the 46 members of the Council of Europe, the body that oversees the Eur... [4431 chars]

title: Israel and Lebanon agree to extend ceasefire, US state department says
description: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.
content:
Israel and Lebanon have agreed a 45-day extension to a shaky ceasefire, following two days of negotiations in Washington DC, the US state department said.
"We hope these discussions will advance lasting peace between the two countries, full recogniti... [1911 chars]

title: Baby Preston Davey had sexual abuse injuries, murder trial told
description: Former teacher Jamie Varley denies sexually abusing and murdering his adopted son Preston Davey.
content:
A baby allegedly murdered by a high school teacher who adopted him had suffered sexual abuse injuries, a court has heard.
Jamie Varley, 37, is on trial accused of the murder of 13-month-old Preston Davey, while his partner John McGowan-Fazakerley, 32... [5135 chars]

title: Shoes found in search for missing 14-year-old near Barnstaple
description: Emergency services have been searching for Taylor Charlton who was last seen on 8 May.
content:
A pair of shoes believed to belong to a 14-year-old boy who has been missing for seven days has been found as part of a "major search operation".
Devon and Cornwall Police said Taylor Charlton was last seen at about 22:40 BST on 8 May, near Tesco in ... [1056 chars]
